instructionEnforcement.atomization-coverage: Run `node atm.mjs guard atomization-coverage --new-paths <files>` when staging new production source.
instructionEnforcement.atom-callsite-readability: Run `node atm.mjs guard atom-callsite-readability` when adding/modifying runAtm or runAtmMap callsites.
instructionEnforcement.evidence-required: Run the validator that owns the touched atom (see validator-to-atom-relationship.json).

instructionEnforcement.atomization-coverage: Codex entry-only profile: invokes `node atm.mjs guard atomization-coverage` via skill harness; full enforcement pending graduation.
instructionEnforcement.atom-callsite-readability: Codex entry-only profile: spec-only enforcement; runtime gate pending graduation.
instructionEnforcement.evidence-required: Codex entry-only profile: evidence collection via batch checkpoint, not direct skill

adapters.graduationCriteria: When Codex skill harness provides reliable in-conversation hook execution, codex adapter graduates to full enforcement parity with claude-code.
adapters.currentGap: Codex skill profiles do not auto-execute pre-commit-style gates; ATM relies on local git hook instead.

instructionEnforcement.atomization-coverage: Copilot reads .github/copilot-instructions.md; instruction includes atomization-coverage guard reminder.
instructionEnforcement.atom-callsite-readability: Copilot reads .github/copilot-instructions.md; readability guard reminder included.
instructionEnforcement.evidence-required: Copilot defers to local git hook for evidence enforcement (no in-loop hook).
instructionEnforcement.limitations: Copilot cannot directly execute CLI commands; user must run guards manually.

instructionEnforcement.atomization-coverage: Cursor rules include atomization-coverage skill that runs guard before commit.
instructionEnforcement.atom-callsite-readability: Cursor rules include readability guard skill.
instructionEnforcement.evidence-required: Cursor skill harness runs validators per task scope.

instructionEnforcement.atomization-coverage: Gemini commands include atomization-coverage guard wrapper.
instructionEnforcement.atom-callsite-readability: Gemini commands include readability guard wrapper.
instructionEnforcement.evidence-required: Gemini commands chain validators per task scope.

instructionEnforcement.atomization-coverage: Antigravity profile uses workspace-root instructions to invoke atomization guards.
instructionEnforcement.atom-callsite-readability: Antigravity profile includes readability guard reminder.
instructionEnforcement.evidence-required: Antigravity defers to local git hook.

manifestHealthChecks.check: manifest files exist for each adapter

manifestHealthChecks.detail: All adapters reference atomization-coverage and atom-callsite-readability
evidence-add command required by all adapters

newProductionSourceEnforcement.trigger: Agent stages a new .ts/.js file in production paths
newProductionSourceEnforcement.enforcement: Pre-commit hook runs atomization-coverage guard which blocks unmapped paths.
newProductionSourceEnforcement.agentInstruction: Every agent pack includes instruction: 'When you add a new production source file, run `node atm.mjs guard atomization-coverage` first to confirm ownership.'

runAtmCallsiteEnforcement.trigger: Agent adds or modifies a runAtm/runAtmMap callsite
runAtmCallsiteEnforcement.agentInstruction: Every agent pack includes instruction: 'When you touch a runAtm callsite, run `node atm.mjs guard atom-callsite-readability` first.'

rollbackPlan.approach: Adapters can be uninstalled via `node atm.mjs integration uninstall <id>`.
rollbackPlan.reversibility: Adapter manifest files are removable without affecting source code.
